title: Building the App Store for Agentic Engineering
summary: Cole Medin is building a workflow marketplace for Archon, a system that allows users to define YAML workflows for agentic engineering that run in isolated git worktrees with any model provider. The marketplace enables users to discover, install, and share pre-built workflows rather than rebuilding the same solutions privately.
